title: Sweet Lavender
writer: Beulah Marie Dix, Arthur Wing Pinero
actors: Mary Miles Minter, Sylvia Ashton, J.M. Dumont
plot: Ruth Holt, owner of a boardinghouse in a small college town, lives with her pretty niece "Sweet Lavender," who believes that Ruth is her mother. When boarder Clem Hale, president of the freshman class, is the victim of a prank played
